creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
New distfile, new diff:

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ./munger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile	Mon Feb  4 10:12:37 2008
+++ ./munger/Makefile	Sat Feb 23 20:02:18 2008
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	4.144
+PORTVERSION=	4.145
  CATEGORIES=	lang
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ./munger/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo	Mon Feb  4 10:12:37 2008
+++ ./munger/distinfo	Sun Feb 24 10:42:21 2008
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (munger-4.144.tar.gz) = c9ac98edea9c7c8105292a4b370b9f8f
-SHA256 (munger-4.144.tar.gz) = 
65ae488d87783cfd042029bbcb6610586e1eb8fb9bbe09f0da920fc838ea7fe4
-SIZE (munger-4.144.tar.gz) = 291407
+MD5 (munger-4.145.tar.gz) = b282dd57c4f3b330c9f014adc8d11a85
+SHA256 (munger-4.145.tar.gz) = 
416386803e297b2c69168d7bf37f23022cc71b93ae8cfd842295241911402501
+SIZE (munger-4.145.tar.gz) = 291967
